data.content: Implementation review passed. Verified: (1) OpenRouter fully removed — all 11 openrouter-specific files deleted, zero remaining references in src/. (2) OpenCode dialect correctly added to agent-adapter.ts — resolveDialect, buildPromptModeArgs (run --format json -m <model> <prompt>), and createLineNormalizer (step_start→skip, text→assistant message, step_finish→result) all implemented per spec. (3) Quality gates confirmed passing: tsc clean, 0 lint errors, 1855 tests passing, build succeeds. (4) Net -4084/+181 lines — clean removal with minimal additions. Approved.
